sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Textron to deliver 65 COMMANDO Select vehicles to Ukraine forces
feed.summary: Textron Systems has secured a $163.4 million contract to supply 65 COMMANDO Select variant vehicles to Ukraine under the USAI and US Foreign Military Sales program. The three-year contract includes the building, delivery, and one year of spare parts support for these vehicles, which are designed for various military roles and offer enhanced crew protection and mobility. This initiative aims to bolster Ukraine's ground mobility and defensive capabilities.

feed.title: Boston Common Asset Management LLC Invests $13.65 Million in Waste Management, Inc. $WM
feed.summary: Boston Common Asset Management LLC has acquired a new stake of 61,791 shares, valued at approximately $13.65 million, in Waste Management (NYSE:WM) during the third quarter. Institutional investors hold a significant majority of WM's stock at 80.40%, while insiders own a small fraction at 0.18%. The company pays a quarterly dividend of $0.825, translating to an annual yield of roughly 1.5%, and Wall Street analysts have a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $250.23.

feed.title: Boston Common Asset Management LLC Sells 5,164 Shares of Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated $VRTX
feed.summary: Boston Common Asset Management LLC reduced its stake in Vertex Pharmaceuticals by 11.2% in the third quarter, selling 5,164 shares, though institutional ownership remains high at 90.96%. Norges Bank made a significant new investment, while insiders like EVP Charles F. Wagner Jr. and Chairman Jeffrey M. Leiden were net sellers of shares. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating for VRTX with a consensus price target of $503.80, and the company recently beat earnings expectations.

feed.title: Boston Common Asset Management LLC Sells 2,829 Shares of United Rentals, Inc. $URI
feed.summary: Boston Common Asset Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in United Rentals (NYSE:URI) by selling 2,829 shares, decreasing its holdings by 30.4% to 6,475 shares valued at $6.18 million. Despite this, analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $966.29. United Rentals recently reported Q3 EPS of $11.70, missing estimates, though revenue of $4.23 billion exceeded expectations.

feed.title: Boston Common Asset Management LLC Sells 108,707 Shares of Verizon Communications Inc. $VZ
feed.summary: Boston Common Asset Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Verizon Communications Inc. by selling 108,707 shares, decreasing its holdings by 19.7%. Despite this, Verizon remains a "Moderate Buy" among analysts with an average price target of $47.25 and offers a substantial 7.0% dividend yield. Other institutional investors have recently adjusted their positions in VZ, indicating varied sentiment towards the stock.

feed.title: Truist Financial Q4 2025 Results: Revenue & EPS Miss Analyst Forecasts | Stock Analysis - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE:TFC) reported Q4 2025 results, with revenue of $5.25 billion and GAAP earnings per share of $1, both missing analyst estimates. Net interest income also fell short of expectations, though the net interest margin exceeded forecasts. The financial services company, formed from a major 2019 merger, has seen its revenue slightly decline over the last five years but remain largely flat in the past two, with a current market capitalization of $62.86 billion.

feed.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. Stock Outperforms Competitors On Strong Trading Day
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. saw its stock outperform competitors on a strong trading day. Concurrently, Unity Software reported its fourth-quarter financial results, with revenue increasing 35% year-over-year to $609 million, surpassing analyst estimates, despite reporting a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: CapWealth Advisors LLC Lowers Position in Equinix, Inc. $EQIX
feed.summary: CapWealth Advisors LLC has reduced its stake in Equinix, Inc. by 7.6%, selling 1,843 shares and retaining 22,567 shares valued at $17.675 million. This divestment occurred amidst clustered insider selling events by senior executives earlier in January, which likely influenced near-term market sentiment for EQIX. Despite the reduction by CapWealth, institutional ownership remains high at 94.9%, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a target price near $959.64.

feed.title: Charter Oak Capital Management LLC Takes Position in The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc $PNC
feed.summary: Charter Oak Capital Management LLC has acquired a new position in The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC), purchasing 11,160 shares valued at approximately $2.24 million in Q3. This move follows PNC's strong Q4 earnings beat, which led to multiple analyst price target increases and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a $231 price target. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.70, offering an annualized yield of about 3.0%.

feed.title: Natural Gas Services Group (NYSE:NGS) Stock Price Passes Above 200 Day Moving Average - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Natural Gas Services Group (NYSE:NGS) stock has recently climbed above its 200-day moving average, trading at $34.56 with positive analyst sentiment, including a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a target price of $40.50. The company reported strong Q3 earnings, beating EPS expectations, and increased its quarterly dividend. Insider activity shows a mix of selling and buying, with institutional investors also increasing their holdings in NGS.

feed.title: CapWealth Advisors LLC Sells 2,423 Shares of GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: CapWealth Advisors LLC reduced its stake in GE Vernova Inc. by 5% in Q3 2025, selling 2,423 shares but still holding 45,575 shares valued at $28.02 million. Despite missing EPS expectations, GE Vernova beat revenue forecasts and increased its quarterly dividend. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $701.62.

feed.title: ARE Investors Have Opportunity to Join Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Fraud Investigation with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced an investigation into Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) for potential securities law violations. This comes after Alexandria reported Q3 2025 financial results that fell short of analyst expectations, including declining revenues and a significant drop in adjusted funds from operations, leading to a nearly 19.2% share price decline. The firm encourages affected shareholders to participate in the investigation.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group introduces Points Choice loyalty programme
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has launched a new "Points Choice" loyalty program, effective January 2026, allowing guests to earn points across Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea and apply them to their preferred loyalty program. This initiative aims to provide more flexibility and value to guests by integrating benefits across its brands, building on the previously introduced Status Match program.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Corp Is Quietly Running Your Money Life – But Is FICO Stock Still Worth the Hype?
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corp (FICO) is a quiet powerhouse behind credit scoring and decision tech, deeply embedded in the financial system. The article explores whether FICO stock is a worthwhile investment, considering its lock-in effect on credit systems, expansion into software and AI, and current premium valuation. While FICO maintains strong brand power and influence, it faces growing competition from alternative credit models and analytics companies.

feed.title: Micron CEO Calls Memory 'Key Enabler' Of AI As It Tackles 'Long Lead Time' To Address Chip Shortage
feed.summary: Micron Technology CEO Sanjay Mehrotra emphasized that memory is a crucial enabler and strategic asset for AI, driving significant demand and a prolonged chip shortage. He highlighted the company's efforts to expand manufacturing and acquire new facilities, acknowledging the "long lead time" required for construction. Despite challenges, Micron has seen significant stock growth and strong performance rankings, indicating its strategic positioning in the market.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor Corp.: How a ‘Boring’ Footwear Portfolio Quietly Became a Powerhouse Platform
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corp. has transformed its footwear brands UGG, HOKA, and Teva into a highly efficient, high-growth product platform. The article details how the company's multi-brand strategy, focus on comfort and design, and strong operational discipline have led to its success and growing market confidence. It positions Deckers as a repeatable machine for footwear innovation, capable of sustained growth and strong margins, impacting its stock valuation.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says "When the Freight Market Turns Around, J.B.Hunt Should Be Able to Make a Fortune"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ: JBHT)'s recent quarter, noting a mixed performance with an earnings beat driven by cost cuts and buybacks, despite a small revenue miss. He believes the company is well-positioned to profit significantly once the freight market recovers, thanks to its current strategies. However, Cramer finds the stock expensive at 27 times this year’s earnings, especially given the ongoing uncertainties in the broader freight industry.

feed.title: CWA Asset Management Group LLC Acquires 4,955 Shares of Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: CWA Asset Management Group LLC has increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) by 2.5%, purchasing 4,955 additional shares to bring its total holdings to 203,728 shares, valued at $105.52 million. This makes Microsoft the firm's third-largest position, representing about 3.9% of its portfolio. While institutional investors are accumulating shares, several insiders have recently sold significant portions of their holdings.

feed.title: Bailard Inc. Makes New $2.04 Million Investment in Coca-Cola Europacific Partners $CCEP
feed.summary: Bailard Inc. has initiated a new investment in Coca-Cola Europacific Partners (CCEP) by purchasing 22,504 shares valued at approximately $2.04 million. Other institutional investors, such as Massachusetts Financial Services, also significantly increased their holdings. CCEP shares recently traded around $89.55, and analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $100.80.

feed.title: Bey Douglas LLC Sells 1,136 Shares of W.W. Grainger, Inc. $GWW

Macpherson who sold 14,523 shares, decreasing his ownership by 11.87%.

feed.title: Bey Douglas LLC Buys Shares of 15,082 Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER
feed.summary: Bey Douglas LLC has initiated a new position in Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) by purchasing 15,082 shares valued at approximately $1.48 million, making it their 21st largest holding. The article also highlights Uber's strong quarterly results and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of around $108.

feed.title: Bey Douglas LLC Sells 518 Shares of Booking Holdings Inc. $BKNG
feed.summary: Bey Douglas LLC reduced its stake in Booking Holdings Inc. by 26.5%, selling 518 shares, bringing their total ownership to 1,438 shares valued at $7.77 million. The firm now holds Booking as its fourth-largest position, representing about 5.8% of its portfolio. This reduction comes amidst Booking's strong earnings, exceeding expectations with $99.50 EPS and $9.01 billion in revenue, although insiders have been net sellers of the stock.

feed.title: BIP Wealth LLC Increases Stock Position in Aflac Incorporated $AFL
feed.summary: BIP Wealth LLC significantly increased its stake in Aflac Incorporated by 367.8% in the third quarter, holding 12,430 shares valued at approximately $1.388 million. Aflac surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, reporting $2.49 EPS and $4.41 billion in revenue, a 59.4% year-over-year increase. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.61, and institutional investors collectively own 67.44% of the stock.

feed.title: Bailard Inc. Purchases 6,476 Shares of Cardinal Health, Inc. $CAH
feed.summary: Bailard Inc. significantly increased its stake in Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) by 106.4%, acquiring an additional 6,476 shares, bringing their total holdings to 12,560 shares valued at approximately $1.971 million. This move comes as analysts maintain a largely bullish outlook on Cardinal Health, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a target price of $216.33. The company recently surpassed Q3 earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $2.55 and revenue of $64.01 billion, and has provided strong FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Bailard Inc. Sells 30,041 Shares of Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK
feed.summary: Bailard Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. during Q3, selling 30,041 shares and retaining 29,044 shares worth approximately $2.44 million. This comes amidst other hedge funds modifying their holdings in MRK. Insider David Michael Williams also sold a substantial number of shares, decreasing his ownership by nearly 26%. Despite these sales, Merck has seen positive clinical developments and analyst price target increases, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $114.20.

feed.title: McDonald's Corporation $MCD Shares Sold by Campbell & CO Investment Adviser LLC
feed.summary: Campbell & CO Investment Adviser LLC significantly reduced its stake in McDonald's Corporation (NYSE:MCD) by 91.3% in Q3, selling over 19,000 shares and retaining 1,840 shares. This move aligns with substantial insider selling activity, including sales by EVP Manuel J.M. Steijaert and CFO Ian Borden, totaling over $13.84 million in the last 90 days. Analyst sentiment for MCD is mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and a target price of $328.88, following a recent EPS miss.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Simon Property's CEO: "We Think David Simon's the Best Mall Operator There Is"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer praised David Simon, CEO of Simon Property Group (SPG), calling him "the best mall operator there is" during a discussion about a club member's diversified portfolio. Cramer expressed concern about one of the REITs, VICI, suggesting it be replaced with a healthcare company like J&J for better diversification. He highlighted SPG's strengths in retail while also recommending consideration of AI stocks for greater upside and less risk.

feed.title: Franchise Capital Ltd Takes Position in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Franchise Capital Ltd initiated a new position in Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) during the third quarter, purchasing 26,500 shares valued at approximately $6.45 million, making it their sixth-largest holding. This institutional buying comes as Alphabet reported stronger-than-expected quarterly results and received upgraded analyst target prices. However, substantial insider selling of 192,687 shares over the past 90 days could impact near-term investor sentiment.

feed.title: Deroy & Devereaux Private Investment Counsel Inc. Trims Stake in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Deroy & Devereaux Private Investment Counsel Inc. reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 2.9% in the third quarter, selling 3,819 shares and now owning 129,911 shares valued at $31.64 million, making it 1.6% of their portfolio. Insiders have also been selling shares, with John Kent Walker selling 17,829 shares and CAO Amie Thuener O'Toole selling 2,778 shares, contributing to a total of 192,687 shares sold by insiders in the last 90 days. Despite the institutional and insider selling, Alphabet reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and holds a consensus "Buy" rating with a target price of $321.97.

feed.title: Eagle Global Advisors LLC Cuts Holdings in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Eagle Global Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. by 20.5% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 44,085 shares, yet Alphabet remains its 17th largest holding. Despite this reduction, Alphabet shows strong fundamentals with Q4 revenue and EPS beats, growing AI commercialization, and multiple analyst price-target upgrades. However, insider selling and broader market volatility could temper near-term sentiment for the tech giant.

feed.title: Blalock Williams LLC Invests $1.34 Million in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Blalock Williams LLC has significantly invested in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG), acquiring 5,507 shares valued at approximately $1.34 million, making it a key holding in their portfolio. This investment comes as Alphabet demonstrates strong financial performance, beating quarterly estimates with robust revenue growth and EPS. Positive developments in AI, including potential Apple integration of Google's Gemini and increased sales of Gemini models, are contributing to strengthened analyst sentiment and increased price targets for the tech giant.

feed.title: Campbell & CO Investment Adviser LLC Sells 118,455 Shares of Manulife Financial Corp $MFC
feed.summary: Campbell & CO Investment Adviser LLC significantly reduced its stake in Manulife Financial Corp (MFC) by 87.1% in Q3, selling 118,455 shares and retaining 17,615 shares. Despite this, analyst sentiment remains positive, with an average "Buy" rating and a target price of $51.50. Manulife also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.44, offering an annualized yield of 4.8%.

feed.title: Telefónica S A : Telefónica Tech will connect more than 4,000 meters for Aguas de Cádiz
feed.summary: Telefónica Tech has partnered with Aguas de Cádiz to transform over 4,000 water meters into smart meters, aiming for more efficient and sustainable water management. This initiative, part of the WATERCOG-PC project, utilizes NB-IoT technology for continuous data communication, enabling accurate billing, early leak detection, and better resource control. The project will initially pilot in a specific neighborhood before expanding across the city.

feed.title: A Critical Vote Looms for Plug Power Shareholders
feed.summary: Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) is facing a critical shareholder vote on January 29, 2026, to double its authorized share count from 1.5 billion to 3.0 billion, a move essential for its financial flexibility. CEO Andy Marsh is engaging directly with retail investors to secure approval, as a previous attempt failed due to stringent charter requirements. Should the proposal fail again, a reverse stock split, often viewed negatively, is a potential backup strategy.

feed.title: Assessing Procter & Gamble (PG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) has seen recent share price weakness, with a 0.64% decline in one day and a 4.04% decline over 90 days. Despite this, long-term investors have seen gains. The article assesses PG's valuation using its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio and a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model, noting that while the P/E ratio suggests it's expensive compared to the industry, the DCF model indicates a significant discount.

feed.title: Robust Earnings Expectations And Consistent Beats Could Be A Game Changer For Analog Devices (ADI)
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) is set to report its fiscal first-quarter 2026 earnings, with Wall Street expecting strong year-over-year profit growth and diluted earnings of US$2.33 per share. The company has consistently topped analysts' earnings forecasts over the past four quarters, reinforcing investor confidence. While robust performance could support current sentiment, investors are urged to consider varied fair value estimates and the possibility that expectations for the stock are already high given its rich earnings multiple.

feed.title: Clarity Wealth Advisors LLC Acquires 2,701 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Clarity Wealth Advisors LLC increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 5.1% in Q3, acquiring an additional 2,701 shares, bringing its total holdings to 55,577 shares valued at approximately $13.51 million. Alphabet now constitutes 3.0% of Clarity Wealth Advisors LLC's portfolio and is its ninth-largest holding. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Alphabet with an average price target of $330.94, even as insiders have recently been net sellers of the stock.

feed.title: Corteva Inc Is Quietly Exploding: Is CTVA the Next Underrated Market Beast?
feed.summary: The article discusses Corteva Inc (CTVA), an agriculture-focused company specializing in seeds and crop protection, as a potential "sleeper play" in the market. Despite not being a typical high-hype stock, it's gaining attention from long-term investors and finance creators on social media as a stable investment tied to global food security and climate-resilient agriculture. The piece highlights Corteva's pure-play focus on food, long-term growth strategy, and position at the intersection of climate and tech, contrasting it with more diversified competitors.

feed.title: Progyny, Inc. (PGNY) supported by analysts as earnings visibility improves
feed.summary: This article from MSN suggests that analysts are showing support for Progyny, Inc. (PGNY). The improved earnings visibility for the company is cited as a key factor contributing to this positive sentiment.

feed.title: Analysts expect Matador Resources Company (MTDR) to navigate lower oil prices effectively
feed.summary: This article analyzes analysts' expectations for Matador Resources Company (MTDR) regarding its ability to manage operations and maintain profitability amidst declining oil prices. It suggests that despite potential market headwinds, analysts anticipate the company will implement effective strategies to mitigate negative impacts.

feed.title: Evergreen Capital Management LLC Has $519,000 Holdings in PPG Industries, Inc. $PPG
feed.summary: Evergreen Capital Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in PPG Industries, Inc. (NYSE:PPG) by 86% in Q3, now holding 4,938 shares valued at $519,000. This comes as CFO Vincent J. Morales also sold 5,200 shares, decreasing his ownership. PPG recently beat quarterly EPS estimates, declared a dividend, and provided FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: NVIDIA is the world’s most valuable company in 2026: Full list of top 10 tech giants; see where Apple and Microsoft stand
feed.summary: In 2026, NVIDIA has become the world's most valuable tech company, surpassing giants like Apple and Microsoft, according to CompaniesMarketCap. This shift highlights a growing investor focus on companies building core technology infrastructure like AI, cloud computing, and semiconductor manufacturing. The rankings, based on market capitalization, indicate the rapid evolution of the tech industry where foundational technology providers are now leading the market.

feed.title: The Truth About PACCAR Inc.: Is This Quiet Truck Stock Low-Key a Power Move?
feed.summary: PACCAR Inc. is presented as a stable and potentially lucrative investment in the industrial sector, contrasting with the hype around AI and meme stocks. The article highlights PACCAR's strong price performance, real-world demand for its trucks and services, and its strategic entry into electric, autonomous, and connected truck technologies. It suggests that PACCAR offers a steady, long-term growth opportunity for investors seeking real assets and dividends, rather than speculative "get rich quick" plays.

feed.title: Crown Melbourne appoints former MGM Resorts and Crown Perth executive Carter Bair as Chief Marketing Officer
feed.summary: Crown Melbourne has appointed Carter Bair as its new Chief Marketing Officer, where he will be responsible for the property's overall marketing strategy, brand positioning, digital marketing, loyalty programs, and partnerships. Bair brings extensive experience from his previous roles at Crown Perth and other leading operators like MGM Resorts International, aiming to enhance customer engagement and commercial performance. Crown Melbourne CEO Ed Domingo highlighted Bair's deep industry knowledge and proven track record as instrumental in strengthening the company's market leadership.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs is Bullish on General Motors Company (GM)
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has raised its price target for General Motors (GM) to $98 from $93 and maintained a Buy rating, based on recent auto sales data and growth projections. Despite regulatory changes affecting previous EV tax credits and emissions, GM's CEO Mary Barra confirmed the company still views EVs as the "end game." GM plans to reduce EV investments by billions while increasing focus on combustion engines, though it will continue to prioritize EV development due to perceived customer benefits.

feed.title: EQT In Focus As Cold Snap Fuels Sharp Gas Price Spike
feed.summary: A severe cold snap in the U.S. has caused natural gas futures to surge over 50%, bringing EQT Corporation, the largest independent U.S. natural gas producer, into sharp focus. This event highlights how short-term weather conditions directly impact EQT's exposure to gas price and volume conditions, with key variables including the duration of the cold, supply infrastructure reliability, and price volatility's effect on contracts and hedging. While high spot prices could boost near-term revenue, investors should also consider risks like potential oversupply in 2027 and recent insider selling.

feed.title: Macquarie Keeps an Underperform Rating on Li Auto Inc. (LI)
feed.summary: Macquarie has maintained an "Underperform" rating on Li Auto Inc. (LI) and reduced its price target from $17 to $15, citing significant cash discounts on long-range EV models, rising input costs, and fierce competition in the BEV SUV market. Separately, Citi reaffirmed its "Neutral" rating but lowered its price target from $20.20 to $18.50 due to lower-than-expected January orders, an aging L series lineup, increased competition, and broader price concessions. Both firms express concerns regarding Li Auto's revenue growth and profitability in the highly competitive NEV market.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on GE HealthCare: "I Just Don't Think It's What You Want to Own"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer advised against owning GE HealthCare (GEHC) stock, suggesting investors consider medical device companies like Medtronic or Abbott instead. He noted that GE HealthCare's products, being discretionary capital expenditures, face challenges in external operating environments, particularly in China. Cooper Investors Global Equities Fund also exited their GEHC investment due to uncertainties and found better opportunities elsewhere.

feed.title: Valero and Phillips 66 identified as first buyers of Vitol's Venezuelan cargoes
feed.summary: Valero and Phillips 66 have reportedly been identified as the initial buyers of Vitol's Venezuelan crude oil cargoes. These US refiners are said to have purchased the crude for delivery into the US Gulf, according to TradeWinds, a global shipping news source. The news was published on January 22, 2026.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley pushes BoE rate cut call to March from February after inflation data By Reuters
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has revised its forecast for the Bank of England's next interest rate cut, pushing it from February to March. This change follows data indicating that British inflation rose more than expected in December. UBS Global Research has made a similar adjustment to its own forecast.
